raw_user_request: Redesign the landing page for a subscription analytics product.
concrete_goal: Redesign the subscription analytics landing page so trial visitors can understand the product promise, inspect plan-oriented proof points, start signup, and see responsive visual hierarchy from the first viewport.
success_criteria: Trial visitors can scan the analytics product offer, customer proof, signup call to action, and pricing handoff without confusion.
The landing page includes meaningful empty or loading state handling for testimonials or proof-point content.
Desktop and mobile layouts preserve readable headings, calls to action, and product vocabulary without overlap.
scope_in: User-facing landing page redesign for the subscription analytics product.
Responsive hero, proof, signup call to action, loading state, empty state, visual polish, and accessibility basics.
scope_out: Payment processing, account provisioning, external analytics integrations, and production deployment.
assumptions: Fictional product metrics and customer proof points are acceptable for the local prototype.
implementation_constraints: Do not add paid services, real customer data, or external tracking.

scenario_flows.name: Trial visitor evaluates product offer
steps: Scan the first viewport product message.
Open the signup call to action.
Inspect proof-point and plan handoff sections.
scenario_flows.expected_result: The redesigned page communicates the analytics product value, keeps the signup path visible, and preserves readable proof-point content.
failure_or_edge_cases: Missing proof-point data shows an empty state instead of broken cards.
Long analytics feature names wrap on mobile without covering the signup control.

verification_matrix.run: Open the local landing page and report the concrete URL or static path.
verification_matrix.behavior_check: Check first viewport, signup call to action, proof-point state coverage, responsive desktop/mobile, and keyboard focus behavior.

acceptance_evidence_plan: Desktop and mobile landing page screenshots plus signup behavior, accessibility, visual hierarchy, and state coverage.

delegation_plan_seed.objective: Redesign the user-facing subscription analytics landing page.
